rules.name: ai-dev-tooling
rules.label: AIDev tooling
rules.reason: AIDevDoctor scripts, rules, templates, and local documentation for AI-assisted development.

rules.name: runtime-config
rules.label: Runtime config
rules.reason: Runtime configuration can change backend, validation, VSync, or debug-view behavior.

rules.name: scene-asset
rules.label: Scene asset
rules.reason: Scene assets affect Sandbox validation content and visual/performance baselines.

rules.name: render-code
rules.label: Render code
rules.reason: Function/Render changes can affect shared render behavior across Vulkan and DX12.

rules.name: rhi-code
rules.label: RHI code
rules.reason: Graphics/RHI changes can affect backend parity, resource lifetime, and validation behavior.

rules.name: shader-code
rules.label: Shader code
rules.reason: Shader changes can affect DXC compilation, reflection, SPIR-V, DXIL, and bindings.

rules.name: docs
rules.label: Documentation
rules.reason: Repository documentation changes should be reviewed for command, path, and workflow accuracy.

rules.name: developer-tooling
rules.label: Developer tooling
rules.reason: General developer tooling can affect build, validation, or generated-report workflows.
